assets.name: lecture_03_figure_03.png
assets.rationale: This is the clearest and most useful frame for note writing. The target relation \([b^-, b^+]=1\) is fully written and unobscured, and the closely related board context \([a^-, a^+]=1\) and \([x,p]=i\) is also visible. Earlier candidates catch Susskind in the act of writing and partially block the equations with his hand or arm.
assets.subtitle_excerpt: Same equations, B minus, B plus equals 1.
assets.caption_hint: oscillator commutators for a and b modes
